A

AbstractDockerAction - Class in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker
Abstract base class for Docker-based adaptation actions.
AbstractDockerAction(String, DockerActionType) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Constructs a new AbstractDockerAction with the specified container ID and action type.
AbstractDockerAction(String, DockerActionType, int) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Constructs a new AbstractDockerAction with the specified parameters.
AbstractDockerAction(String, DockerActionType, int, DockerClient) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Constructs a new AbstractDockerAction with a custom Docker client.
actionId - Variable in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
 
actionType - Variable in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
 
AdaptationActionException - Exception in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions
Exception thrown when an adaptation action fails to execute properly.
AdaptationActionException(String) - Constructor for exception tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions.AdaptationActionException
Constructs a new AdaptationActionException with the specified message.
AdaptationActionException(String, String, String) - Constructor for exception tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions.AdaptationActionException
Constructs a new AdaptationActionException with action context.
AdaptationActionException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions.AdaptationActionException
Constructs a new AdaptationActionException with the specified message and cause.
AdaptationActionException(String, Throwable, String, String) - Constructor for exception tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions.AdaptationActionException
Constructs a new AdaptationActionException with action context and cause.
AdaptationActionResult - Enum in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums
Enumeration representing the possible results of an adaptation action execution.

Checks if this action can be performed given the current system state.

DISCONNECT_NETWORK - tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.DockerActionType
Disconnect a container from a network.

Exception thrown when a Docker-specific adaptation action fails.

Constructs a new DockerActionException with the specified message and cause.

Constructs a new DockerActionException with container context and cause.

Factory class for creating Docker adaptation actions.

Creates a new DockerActionFactory with default settings.

Creates a new DockerActionFactory with an existing Docker client.

Creates a new DockerActionFactory with the specified Docker host.
DockerActionFactory(String, int) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Creates a new DockerActionFactory with the specified settings.
DockerActionType - Enum in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums
Enumeration representing the types of Docker adaptation actions available.
dockerClient - Variable in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
 
DockerUtils - Class in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.utils
Utility class providing helper methods for Docker operations.

E

EXEC_COMMAND - tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.DockerActionType
Execute a command inside a running container.

G

getActionId() - Method in interface tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.core.IAdaptationAction
Returns the unique identifier of this adaptation action.
getActionId() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
 
getActionId() - Method in exception tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions.AdaptationActionException
Returns the identifier of the action that caused this exception.
getActionType() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Returns the Docker action type.
getActionType() - Method in exception tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions.AdaptationActionException
Returns the type of the action that caused this exception.
getCommand() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ExecCommandAction
Returns the command to execute.
getContainerId() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Returns the target container ID.
getContainerId() - Method in exception tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions.DockerActionException
Returns the identifier of the container involved in this exception.
getContainerNamePattern() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Returns the container name pattern.
getContainerState(DockerClient, String) - Static method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.utils.DockerUtils
 
getCpuShares() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Returns the CPU shares setting.
getCreatedContainerIds() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleOutAction
Returns the list of created container IDs.
getDefaultTimeoutSeconds() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Returns the default timeout in seconds.
getDescription() - Method in interface tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.core.IAdaptationAction
Returns a human-readable description of this adaptation action.
getDescription() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
 
getDescription() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ExecCommandAction
 
getDescription() - Method in enum tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.AdaptationActionResult
Returns the description of this result.
getDescription() - Method in enum tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.DockerActionType
Returns the description of this action type.
getDockerActionType() - Method in exception tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.exceptions.DockerActionException
Returns the type of Docker action that caused this exception.
getDockerClient() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Returns the Docker client used by this factory.
getExitCode() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ExecCommandAction
Returns the exit code of the command.
getMemoryLimit() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Returns the memory limit setting.
getPreviousState() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.RestartContainerAction
Returns the previous state of the container before restart.
getRemoveCount() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Returns the number of containers to remove.
getRemovedContainerIds() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Returns the list of removed container IDs.
getReplicaCount() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleOutAction
Returns the number of replicas to create.
getSignal() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.KillContainerAction
Returns the signal used by this kill action.
getStderr() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ExecCommandAction
Returns the captured stderr output.
getStdout() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ExecCommandAction
Returns the captured stdout output.
getTimeoutSeconds() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Returns the timeout in seconds for this action.

I

IAdaptationAction - Interface in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.core
The IAdaptationAction interface defines a contract for classes that represent an action to be performed as part of an adaptation process.
IN_PROGRESS - tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.AdaptationActionResult
The adaptation action is currently in progress.
INSPECT_CONTAINER - tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.DockerActionType
Inspect container details.
isAutoStart() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleOutAction
Returns whether auto-start is enabled.
isCommandSuccessful() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ExecCommandAction
Checks if the command executed successfully (exit code 0).
isContainerPaused(String) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Checks if a container is in a paused state.
isContainerRunning(String) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Checks if a container is in a running state.
isContainerStopped(String) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
Checks if a container is in a stopped/exited state.
isDockerAvailable() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Tests the connection to Docker.
isDockerAvailable(DockerClient) - Static method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.utils.DockerUtils
 
isFailure() - Method in enum tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.AdaptationActionResult
Checks if this result indicates a failure.
isForce() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.RemoveContainerAction
Returns whether force removal is enabled.
isGracefulStop() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Returns whether graceful stop is enabled.
isRemoveVolumes() - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.RemoveContainerAction
Returns whether volume removal is enabled.
isRunningInContainer() - Static method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.utils.DockerUtils
 
isSuccessful() - Method in enum tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.AdaptationActionResult
Checks if this result indicates a successful outcome.

K

Constructs a new KillContainerAction with a specific signal.

Constructs a new KillContainerAction with a custom timeout.

The adaptation action requires additional resources that are unavailable.

Restart a container (stop then start).

Constructs a new RestartContainerAction with a custom Docker client.

Rolls back the adaptation action if possible.

ROLLBACK_FAILED - tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.AdaptationActionResult
The rollback of the adaptation action failed.
ROLLED_BACK - tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.AdaptationActionResult
The adaptation action was rolled back successfully.

S

SCALE_IN - tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.DockerActionType
Scale in by removing container replicas.
SCALE_OUT - tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.enums.DockerActionType
Scale out by creating additional container replicas.
scaleIn(String) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Creates a ScaleInAction to remove one container.
scaleIn(String, int) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Creates a ScaleInAction with specified removal count.
ScaleInAction - Class in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions
Adaptation action that scales in by removing container replicas.
ScaleInAction(String) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Constructs a new ScaleInAction to remove one container matching the pattern.
ScaleInAction(String, int) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Constructs a new ScaleInAction with specified removal count.
ScaleInAction(String, int, String, boolean) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Constructs a new ScaleInAction with all options.
ScaleInAction(String, int, String, boolean, int) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Constructs a new ScaleInAction with custom timeout.
ScaleInAction(String, int, String, boolean, int, DockerClient) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleInAction
Constructs a new ScaleInAction with a custom Docker client.
scaleOut(String) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Creates a ScaleOutAction to add one replica.
scaleOut(String, int) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Creates a ScaleOutAction with specified replica count.
scaleOut(String, int, boolean, String) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.DockerActionFactory
Creates a ScaleOutAction with full options.
ScaleOutAction - Class in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions
Adaptation action that scales out by creating additional container replicas.
ScaleOutAction(String) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleOutAction
Constructs a new ScaleOutAction to create one replica.
ScaleOutAction(String, int) - Constructor for class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.ScaleOutAction
Constructs a new ScaleOutAction with specified replica count.

W

withCpuPeriod(Long) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Sets the CPU period for the CFS scheduler (in microseconds).
withCpuQuota(Long) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Sets the CPU quota for the CFS scheduler (in microseconds).
withCpusetCpus(String) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Sets the CPUs to which the container is pinned.
withCpuShares(Integer) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Sets the CPU shares (relative weight).
withMemoryLimit(Long) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Sets the memory limit (in bytes).
withMemoryLimitMB(int) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Sets the memory limit using human-readable format.
withMemorySwapLimit(Long) - Method in class tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction
Sets the memory swap limit (in bytes).
